news.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

news.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

news.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?

news.title: Applied Computing raises $20m to build a foundation model for the refinery
news.description: [TNW] The London startup says plants run on less than 8% of the data they collect. Its Orbital model fuses time series, physics and language. KBR led the $20m round.
